sentences.english: Sleep deprivation costs the global economy an estimated four hundred and eleven billion dollars annually through lost productivity.
After just one night of poor sleep cognitive performance drops by roughly twenty-five percent.
sentences.korean: 수면이 부족한 밤 하루만 지나도 인지 능력이 약 25% 떨어진다.

sentences.english: Some forward-thinking companies have responded by installing nap rooms and shifting to results-based performance metrics rather than measuring hours spent at a desk.
sentences.korean: 일부 선진적인 기업들은 낮잠 공간을 설치하고 책상에서 보낸 시간 대신 결과 기반 성과 지표로 전환함으로써 대응했다.

quiz.question: What does '인지 능력' mean in English?
